title: Quiz: QNG Applications
description: Test your understanding of quantum natural gradient applications

questions.question: Why is QNG particularly effective for VQE optimization?

options.text: It accounts for the geometry of the energy landscape

questions.explanation: QNG is effective for VQE because it adapts to the quantum state geometry, providing efficient navigation through the complex energy landscape.

questions.question: How should QFI be computed for quantum classifiers with multiple training samples?

options.text: Average the QFI over all training samples

questions.explanation: For classifiers, the QFI should be averaged over the training batch to capture the overall geometry of the loss landscape across data points.

questions.question: How can QNG help with barren plateaus?

options.text: By rescaling gradients based on local curvature

questions.explanation: QNG helps with barren plateaus by rescaling small gradients according to local curvature (QFI), though this may have limited effect if QFI eigenvalues also decay.

questions.question: How should regularization be adjusted in noisy quantum systems?

options.text: Keep it constant regardless of noise

questions.explanation: Higher noise reduces QFI and makes inversion less stable, requiring stronger regularization to maintain numerical stability.

questions.question: QNG typically converges in fewer iterations than standard gradient descent for VQC optimization.
questions.explanation: True. By accounting for parameter geometry, QNG typically converges faster in terms of iteration count, though each iteration is more computationally expensive.

questions.question: What QFI property indicates good circuit expressibility?
questions.explanation: High QFI trace indicates the circuit can express diverse quantum states and parameters are effective at changing the state.

questions.question: What does a low condition number of the QFI matrix indicate?
questions.explanation: Low condition number means eigenvalues are similar in magnitude, indicating balanced parameter sensitivity and easier optimization.

questions.question: Which are design principles for QNG-friendly circuits? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Good QNG circuits avoid redundancy (full rank), use interleaved structure, and maintain QFI properties. Maximum depth causes QFI decay and is not recommended.
